theme_and_concept.description: A high-trust, authoritative, yet modern interface. Uses the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' paired with an 'Earthy/Organic' palette to build trust for a service handling sensitive personal documents and international payments.
theme_and_concept.emotional_tone: Reassuring, structured, secure, and clear. Zero distractions.

typography.heading_strategy: Solid, reassuring, wide display characteristics. Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large headers.
typography.body_strategy: Tabular layout by default, crisp and highly readable at small sizes. Excellent for data-dense admin tables.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use extended spacing (p-6, p-8, p-12) for the Student wizard to create breathing room. Use tight spacing (p-2, p-4) for Admin.
layout_and_spacing.student_layout: Split-screen bento: 4-col sticky left sidebar for the wizard progress steps, 8-col right side for the active form card. Wide gaps (gap-8 or gap-12).
layout_and_spacing.admin_layout: Full-width 'Terminal/Grid' look. Strict table grids. No max-width limitations to maximize data density.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Student side uses soft 'Tactile' style (1px border-slate-200 + shadow-sm). Admin uses 'Grid Borders' (border-collapse, visible structural borders).

components_and_interactions.cards: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] rounded-xl (Student). rounded-none or rounded-sm (Admin).
components_and_interactions.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions on Student side to feel friendly. Sharp rectangles (rounded-sm) for Admin side actions.
components_and_interactions.inputs: Shadcn UI defaults but override borders to border-slate-300 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary. No heavy box-shadows.
components_and_interactions.transitions: Use Framer Motion for stepping through the wizard (slide-left/right with opacity crossfade). All hover states must explicitly declare text and bg color transitions.
components_and_interactions.icons: Use lucide-react (strictly no emojis). Run `yarn add lucide-react` if not installed.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only use for sticky headers (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50). Never for forms.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle SVG noise overlay on the Student side background (opacity-20) to kill the 'digital flatness'.
visual_enhancers.doc_vault: Upload zones must have thick dashed borders (border-2 border-dashed border-slate-300), bg-slate-50, hover:bg-slate-100 hover:border-primary transition-colors.

images.description: Student studying with a laptop. Perfect for the login/register page background or split-screen.
Chinese university campus. Good for the 'University Selection' step in the wizard to add visual appeal.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements (inputs, selects, buttons, file drops, row actions) MUST have a role-based kebab-case data-testid (e.g., data-testid='submit-identity-button', data-testid='student-row-approve').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text is used over the primary #1C3530 button backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use named exports for all React components (.js files) and default exports for Pages.
Do NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', or 'Open Sans'. Strictly import and use 'Chivo' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts.
The admin dashboard must be extremely dense. Do not use standard Shadcn Cards for data rows. Build a high-density raw HTML/Tailwind table.
Implement the multi-step form state management robustly so students don't lose data between steps.
NEVER use generic placeholder texts; use French labels (e.g., 'Prénom', 'Nom de famille', 'Passeport').
For toasts, use Sonner. Avoid generic JS alerts.
No HTML <input type='date'>; use Shadcn Calendar.
Include 'data-testid' on every major UI element as required by the testing framework.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Do not converge toward generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Inject personality using the specified typography and earthy/high-contrast palette.
Never apply 'transition: all'. Explicitly state transition properties.
Do not center-align the main app wrapper container; respect natural left-aligned reading flows.
Do not use AI emoji characters for icons. Use lucide-react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (e.g., hover lifts, subtle color shifts).
Ensure accessible contrast ratios, especially over the earthy background tones.
